sll $0,$0,0
#initialize
addi $0,$0,0x0000
addi $1,$0,0xFFFB
addi $2,$0,0xFFFF

# blez test: $1 = -5 <= 0, should branch
blez $1,TARGET1
addi $3,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET1:
addi $4,$0,0x0001

# Test blez with positive value (should not branch)
addi $5,$0,0x0005
blez $5,TARGET2
addi $6,$0,0x0001
j TARGET3
TARGET2:
addi $6,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET3:

# Test blez with zero (should branch)
addi $7,$0,0x0000
blez $7,TARGET4
addi $8,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET4:
addi $9,$0,0x0001

# Test blez with larger negative value
addi $10,$0,0xFFFF
blez $10,TARGET5
addi $11,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET5:
addi $12,$0,0x0001

halt
